hero.title: Can't make the game? Stay connected with Staydia Sports
hero.subtitle: The complete streaming and fan engagement platform for sports clubs and leagues
hero.description: Transform how your fans experience live sports with our professional streaming platform, real-time analytics, and revenue-sharing opportunities.
hero.subheading: Revolutionise Your Club's Reach & Revenue: AI-Automated Sports Camera & Streaming, Zero Cost

features.title: Why Clubs Choose Staydia
features.subtitle: Join many other amateur football, field hockey, rugby, and basketball clubs across the EU & UK partnering with Staydia Sports. We provide the AI camera, the platform, and the expertise – you keep 100% of your ad revenue. It's that simple.

zeroInvestment.title: Zero Investment Required
zeroInvestment.description: We install and maintain AI-powered cameras at your venue with absolutely no upfront costs to your club.

revenue.title: Revenue Generation
revenue.description: Create new income streams through fan subscriptions and in-stream sponsorship opportunities.

fanEngagement.title: Enhanced Fan Engagement
fanEngagement.description: Stay connected with your community by allowing supporters to watch live and on demand, from anywhere.

streaming.title: Professional Livestreaming
streaming.description: Automated high-quality broadcasting with custom branding and highlight creation tools.

platform.title: Club-Branded Streaming Platform
platform.description: Give your fans a professional viewing experience featuring your club's branding.
platform.caption: Staydia's club-branded streaming interface

solutions.title: Revolutionising Sports Streaming with AI
solutions.description: Staydia Sports brings professional-quality broadcasting to clubs and leagues of all levels—effortlessly and at no cost.
solutions.smartCamera: AI-Powered Smart Camera System – Fully automated, fixed cameras that capture every game without a cameraman.
solutions.livestreaming: High-Quality Livestreaming Platform – Stream matches live or on-demand to fans anywhere.
solutions.clubBranded: Custom Club-Branded Experience – Your club's colors, logos, and identity front and center for fans.
solutions.revenueGeneration: Revenue Generation – Create new income streams through fan subscriptions and in-stream sponsorship opportunities.
solutions.highlights: Highlights & Tactical Clipping – Tactical & highlight clips created with easy to use tool.
solutions.socialMedia: Seamless Social Media Integration – Instantly create and share video content across your club's channels.
solutions.tagline: Staydia Sports: Where technology powers your club's growth.

forLeaguesList.item1: AI-automated cameras installed at every club across your league
forLeaguesList.item2: Complete match library across all competition levels
forLeaguesList.item3: Automatic capture technology with zero manual intervention
forLeaguesList.item4: Enhanced engagement across your entire league ecosystem

solutions.readyToTransformDesc: Schedule a consultation to learn how Staydia can help capture every match across your entire league automatically.

enterpriseList.item6: Clipping tool for Social media Highlights

howItWorks.title: Implementation Process
howItWorks.subtitle: A streamlined approach to elevating your organisation's broadcasting capabilities.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Meet with our team to discuss your organisation's specific broadcasting needs.
howItWorks.step2Desc: League wide adoption of our AI cameras or club by club.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Our technical team handles the complete setup and integration of our AI cameras for clubs.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Ongoing dedicated support and maintenance to ensure optimal performance.
howItWorks.ctaTitle: Ready to elevate your sports broadcasting?
